    		{{`名称`|$.T}} {{`作用域`|$.T}} {{`驱动`|$.T}} {{`IPv6`|$.T}} {{`Internal`|$.T}} {{`Attachable`|$.T}} {{`Ingress`|$.T}} {{`ConfigOnly`|$.T}} {{`IPAM`|$.T}} {{`Labels`|$.T}} {{`创建时间`|$.T}} {{`操作`|$.T}}
    		{{$v.Name}} {{$v.Scope}} {{$v.Driver}} {{if $v.EnableIPv6}}{{else}}{{end}} {{if $v.Internal}}{{else}}{{end}} {{if $v.Attachable}}{{else}}{{end}} {{if $v.Ingress}}{{else}}{{end}} {{if $v.ConfigOnly}}{{else}}{{end}} Driver: {{$v.IPAM.Driver}}
    {{range $kk,$vv:=$v.IPAM.Config}} Subnet: {{$vv.Subnet}}
    Gateway: {{$vv.Gateway}}
    {{end}}     		{{range $kk,$vv:=$v.Labels}} {{$kk}}: {{$vv}}
    {{end}}     		{{$v.Created.Local.Format "2006-01-02 15:04:05"}}
